channel.title: File Type :: Choria Configuration Manager
channel.description: File resource for managing files and directories

item.title: Posix Provider
item.description: This document describes the implementation details of the Posix file provider for managing files and directories on Unix-like systems. Provider Selection The Posix provider is the default and only file provider. It is always available and returns priority 1 for all file resources. Operations Store (Create/Update File) Process:
